reminder_35.subject: Your Duxbury Clipper subscription — time to renew soon
reminder_35.body:
Your subscription expires on {expiration_date} — about 5 issues from now.

To keep your weekly Clipper coming, please renew at your convenience.

Or mail a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

Thank you for supporting your hometown paper!

reminder_21.subject: Reminder: Your Duxbury Clipper subscription expires soon
reminder_21.body:
Just a reminder — your subscription expires on {expiration_date} (about 3 issues away).

Don't miss a single issue. Renew now.

Or send a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

reminder_14.subject: 2 issues left — please renew your Duxbury Clipper subscription
reminder_14.body:
You have about 2 issues remaining on your Duxbury Clipper subscription (expires {expiration_date}).

Renew today to avoid any interruption in delivery.

Or mail a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

expire_day.subject: Oh no...your Clipper subscription expires today
expire_day.body:
Your Duxbury Clipper subscription expires today.

Good news — we'll keep delivering your paper for up to 4 more weeks while you renew. Please don't let it lapse!

Or mail a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

grace_14.subject: Action needed: Your Duxbury Clipper subscription is past due
grace_14.body:
Your Duxbury Clipper subscription expired on {expiration_date}.

We've continued delivering your paper as a courtesy, but delivery will stop in about 2 weeks if we don't hear from you.

Or mail a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

grace_final.subject: Final notice: Duxbury Clipper delivery stopping this week
grace_final.body:
We're sorry to say that your Duxbury Clipper home delivery will stop this week unless you renew.

Your subscription expired on {expiration_date} and we haven't received a renewal. We'd love to keep you on our list!

Or call us at 781-934-2811 or mail a check to: The Duxbury Clipper, P.O. Box 1656, Duxbury, MA 02331

We hope to hear from you — thank you for being a loyal reader.
